div.h1: Ionosense HPC - High-Performance Research Platform for Ionospheric Signal Analysis
div.p: Research Advantages: 100-1000� Acceleration " Full Reproducibility " Automated Workflows " Publication Ready

Core Technologies: CUDA 13.0 • cuFFT • C++17 • Python 3.11 CLI Tools: ionoc (C++ dev) • iprof (profiling) • iono dashboard (analysis) Research Tools: MLflow • Hydra • Snakemake • Streamlit • DVC Stability Features: GPU Clock Locking (CV: 20% → 5-10%)
Platform Status: Production Ready (v0.9.4+) GPU Support: NVIDIA (Turing, Ampere, Ada) OS Support: Windows, Linux, Docker License: MIT (Open Source)
